docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT BEST BUY - CLIFF CHANG PAC SALES MANAGER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-30-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF MARCELLA FUENTES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BEST BUY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CLIFF CHANG PAC, APPLIANCE MANAGER (PAC-JEN CHENG - TRUE NAME). PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF FUENTES, MARCELLA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FUENTES, MARCELLA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BEST BUY - CLIFF CHANG PAC SALES MANAGER MARCELLA FUENTES MAY KEEP CHECK FOR APPROXIMATELY $2600 WHICH BEST BUY SENT TO MS. FUENTES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FUENTES, MARCELLA AS TO DEFENDANT BEST BUY - CLIFF CHANG PAC SALES MANAGER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED SEP-02-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BEST BUY - CLIFF CHANG PAC SALES MANAGER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2019 - JUDGMENT.
